name: mission
description: Fast + smart worker(s) solving one issue, orchestrator as quality gate

worker_fast.description:
A fast coding agent (Cursor) for straightforward implementation tasks.
Best for: writing new code, simple refactors, adding features with clear specs, file edits, and any task where speed matters more than deep reasoning.
It has full codebase access, can run tests, and execute git commands.
Give it a SHORT directive (1-3 sentences) describing desired BEHAVIOR, not implementation. It reads .kodo/architecture.md for architectural context.
If it seems stuck, set new_conversation=true with a fresh directive.
If the result contains [Context was reset: ...], give enough context in your next directive for the worker to continue effectively.

worker_smart.description:
A powerful reasoning agent (Claude Code) for complex tasks requiring deep thinking.
Best for: debugging tricky issues, architectural decisions, complex refactors, tasks requiring understanding of large codebases, and anything where the fast worker struggled.
It has full codebase access, can run tests, and execute git commands.
Give it a SHORT directive (1-3 sentences) describing desired BEHAVIOR, not implementation. It reads .kodo/architecture.md for architectural context.
If it seems stuck, set new_conversation=true with a fresh directive.
If the result contains [Context was reset: ...], give enough context in your next directive for the worker to continue effectively.
